curation_notes: Patch commit f92a9ef modified only one non-test source file (Parse-Dashboard/app.js) and added one new test file. The vulnerability is in the route registration for the AI agent endpoint (POST /apps/:appId/agent) which was defined without any authentication middleware. The patch extracts the handler into a named function and adds authentication and CSRF middleware. Location derived from the patch diff; the advisory description confirms the endpoint path but does not name specific functions.
